name: remove-newlines
title: Remove Newlines
description: This extension removes line breaks from text.
author: stefann

commands.name: replace-without-newlines
commands.title: Replace Without Newlines
commands.subtitle: Remove Newlines
commands.description: Replaces selected text without line breaks

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
